source: Emitter oracle (Task 21): RMC.BestFit UnivariateDistributionModel.Validate() driven on the real library (Numerics @ 2a0357a, RMC-BestFit @ c2e6192) via tools/oracle_emitter and reproduced by tools/verify_oracles.py. Task 16 introduced the Validate target but wired it only on the IModel/Phase-7a families; this file closes the asymmetry by exercising the same is_valid / validation_message_contains surface on the OLDER UnivariateDistributionModelBase build+dispatch path (the emitter's BuildEstimation/DispatchEstimation, widened in Task 21 to match BuildEstimationGeneral/DispatchEstimationGeneral). The assertion pinned is the log-support check: a log-family parent rejects a non-positive exact observation, the same data passes under a non-log family, and the same family passes on all-positive data -- so the check is discriminating in all three directions. Structural check only: validation_message_contains is a substring probe, not a byte-exact pin of the message text.

args: Log based distributions cannot be used
Log based distributions cannot be used
